blurb: Express Cards allow Apple Pay and Apple Wallet credentials to function in a low-power mode without Face ID, Touch ID, or passcode authentication – supporting transit cards, hotel room keys, and student IDs. The Secure Element maintains a dedicated power reserve so Express Card transactions remain possible even when the iPhone battery is depleted. To prevent unauthorized large-value payments, Express Mode is restricted to specific card types that issuers explicitly configure, and Apple imposes transaction limits on eligible card categories to bound the risk of unauthorized use when authentication is bypassed.
